CREATE TABLE xml_storage (id INT, xml_fragment TEXT);
DECLARE tree any; tree := xml_tree((SELECT xml_fragment FROM xml_storage WHERE id = 1), 1, 'http://localhost.localdomain/', 'ISO');
DECLARE tree any; tree := xml_tree((SELECT xml_fragment FROM xml_storage WHERE id = 2), 1, 'http://localhost.localdomain/', 'UTF-8');
DECLARE tree any; tree := xml_tree((SELECT xml_fragment FROM xml_storage WHERE id IN (1, 2)), 1, 'http://localhost.localdomain/', 'ISO');
DECLARE tree any; tree := xml_tree((SELECT xml_fragment FROM xml_storage WHERE id = 1), 1, 'http://localhost.localdomain/', 'ISO');
CREATE TABLE xml_test (id INT, content TEXT);
DECLARE tree any; tree := xml_tree((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 1, 'http://localhost.localdomain/', 'ISO');
DECLARE tree any; tree := xml_tree((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 2), 1, 'http://localhost.localdomain/', 'ISO');
